snippet.title: Woman wakes up in the coffin at her funeral #shorts
snippet.description:
An Ecuadorian woman has risen from the 'dead' after almost being buried alive.

Shocking video footage shows the moment 76-year-old Bella Montoya was rescued from her coffin, after being stuck inside for over four hours.

The woman was declared deceased after suffering a stroke in hospital and taken to a local funeral home for preparations.

snippet.title: LOTTERY WINNERS WHO DREAMT ABOUT IT FIRST!
snippet.description:
This video features lottery winners who dreamt about it first and then won! It is narrated by podcaster and Powerball winner Timothy Schultz.

There are many people who dreamt about winning the lottery and won. In fact, this happened to Timothy Schultz. In 1999, he won the lottery jackpot a few months after having a vivid dream about it. LEARN MORE: https://youtu.be/KD2WSIR_rCs

The lottery winners featured in this video are recent. They include:

1) In November of 2022, a man won a $1 million dollar Maxmillions prize from Lotto Max in Oakville, Canada. This comes after having a dream about it a few years prior. 

2) An unemployed Peruvian woman recently won Spain’s Christmas lottery. It is known as the richest lottery in the world and gave away $2.7 billion in 2022 to hundreds of people. This winner scored $425,000 after having a dream where her deceased father told her to play. 

3) In June of 2022, a man in Virginia purchased a lottery ticket with numbers he saw in a dream and won a quarter million dollars! 

4) In May of 2022, a Victorian mother scored $4.8 million in the lottery after her son predicted she would win from a dream. The Melton, Australia woman described it as “mind boggling.”

5) In Maryland, a woman scored $25k from the lottery with numbers her sister saw in a dream. She dreamt about numbers on a bus. Those lucky numbers turned out to score her a $25,000 jackpot! 

6) A 46-year-old Michigan woman won a $300,000 jackpot after having a dream about it. 

7) A man in Australia won $3.4 million from the lottery after numbers came in a vivid dream. 

8) A Canadian woman won $60 million from Lotto Max. She says that she got the numbers from her husband’s dream. He dreamt about them two decades ago and she has been playing them ever since. It paid off when she hit a massive $60 million jackpot! 

Each year, there are numerous people who win the lottery after having dreams about it. If you accept that this is not a coincidence, then it begs the question, how is this possible? Some people believe it’s the result of manifestation and the power of the subconscious mind. Others believe it’s intuition and tapping into the higher self. In fact, there are some quantum physicists who believe there is no time. If that is true, is it possible to see the future? 

The truth is that you don’t need to have a dream about winning the lottery to have a chance to win. All you need is one ticket! Never spend more than you can afford, have fun, and remember that you do have a chance if you play.

What do you think about these lottery winners who dreamt about it first? Comment below with your thoughts!!

Timothy Schultz is a podcaster and Youtuber with Bullhead Entertainment, LLC. In 1999, he won the Powerball before going back to college to study journalism and broadcast news. He’s now combining his experience to launch this podcast. 
 
This channel has an emphasis on overcoming the odds and the belief that anything is possible. Previous guests have included the winner of the first American season of 'Big Brother', a near death-experience survivor and several lottery winners, among other guests.

snippet.title: Russell Brand jokes on a now-deleted podcast about sexually assaulting a woman
snippet.description:
Russell Brand made a joke about a raping a woman during a live comedy podcast with footage deleted from YouTube in the past 24 hours, according to MailOnline.

The 2013 interview between Brand and Richard Herring has also been removed from Soundcloud, it has been reported.

During the Richard Herring's Leicester Square Theatre Podcast, Brand joked: "I’ve raped someone once", he later added he "killed her after". The audience and Mr Herring responded by laughing.

snippet.title: Doctor Shares Psychic and Spiritual Stories of Healing with Rod Chelberg
snippet.description:
Rod Chelberg, MD, practiced General Internal Medicine and Emergency Room Medicine for over 25 years. He was the medical director at St. Joseph’s Hospital, Beacon Hospice, and nursing homes in the Bangor, Maine area. He lectures on topics of mysticism and A Course in Miracles. He is author of When God Calls, Say “Yes!”: A Physician’s Experience of Mystical Guidance. His website is drrodchelberg.com.

Rod Chelberg shares several stories of being guided by a divine presence in the emergency room, ICU, and end-of-life care as a physician. He describes how we are all mystics and can quiet our minds to awaken spiritual gifts, let love flow, and walk in peace.

00:00:00 Introduction
00:02:10 Psychic and spiritual gifts
00:14:32 Seeing inside the body
00:20:03 Quieting the mind
00:31:28 Massive stroke
00:41:02 Angels and orbs

00:59:48 Positive attitude
01:12:50 Spirituality and medicine
01:21:00 Conclusion

Rod Chelberg, MD, practiced General Internal Medicine and Emergency Room Medicine for over 25 years. He was the medical director at St. Joseph’s Hospital, Beacon Hospice, and nursing homes in the Bangor, Maine area. He lectures on topics of mysticism and A Course in Miracles. He is author of When God Calls, Say “Yes!”: A Physician’s Experience of Mystical Guidance. His website is drrodchelberg.com.

Rod Chelberg shares several stories of being guided by a divine presence in the emergency room, ICU, and end-of-life care as a physician. He describes how we are all mystics and can quiet our minds to awaken spiritual gifts, let love flow, and walk in peace.

snippet.title: VLOG | 24 Hours in Atlanta | BeyGOOD & Beyoncé are Giving 1 Million $$$ to 1,000+ Entrepreneurs
snippet.description:
What a time to be alive! I was invited to the Black Parade Route Impact Luncheon hosted by the BeyGOOD Foundation, Beyoncé's non-profit. The event was led by Ivy McGregor, Executive Director of BeyGOOD and featured keynote speaker Tyler Perry. There was a musical performance by Le'Andria Johnson that literally had everyone in tears! The amazing Yvette Noel-Schure, Beyoncé's publicist was also present to support the initiative. 

Although I did not leave with one if the $10,000 grants - the experience was EVERYTHING and more. I am so appreciative I had the opportunity and means to be present. Congratulations to all the grant recipients and thank you BeyGOOD and amazing sponsors for all of the additional resources you provided for all attendees!
